page: Microsoft Azure A2_v2 is an entry-level virtual machine from the Av2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The configuration includes 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 2 vCPUs. It is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. Additionally, the instance includes 20 GB of local storage and does not bundle any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data places the A2_v2 in the bottom 10% across all evaluated performance categories. The single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU benchmarks recorded scores of 362.4 and 685.0, respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show 60.11 GB/sec for cached small blocks, dropping to 7.64 GB/sec for uncached large block reads and 6.55 GB/sec for writes. Cryptographic and compression tasks also reflect limited throughput, with single-threaded gzip compression at 7.17 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression at 2.43 GB/sec.

Given the low processing and memory thresholds, this server is constrained to low-demand workloads. It is suitable for basic utility tasks, lightweight static web serving, or simple development environments. It is not designed for memory-intensive databases, large-scale LLM inference, or high-throughput compute tasks. The qualitative cost profile is highly economical, trading off raw performance and memory capacity for low-cost entry-level compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure A2_v2 is an entry-level virtual machine within the Av2 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with an Intel Xeon 8171M x86_64 processor running at 2.6 GHz, offering 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) and 4.0 GB of system memory. The hardware includes 20 GB of local storage and no GPU resources. Performance benchmarks for this instance consistently rank in the bottom 10% across CPU, memory bandwidth, and compression metrics, with stress-ng multi-core scoring 685.0 and static web serving throughput reaching 0.82 GB/sec. This server represents a low-cost, resource-constrained option suitable primarily for lightweight utility tasks, basic development environments, or low-traffic static web hosting where high computational throughput and large memory capacities are not required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure A2_v2 is an entry-level virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 20 GB of local storage, designed for low-demand utility workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure A2_v2 is a budget-friendly virtual machine with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 20 GB of local storage.
tagline: An entry-level, budget-friendly virtual machine with dedicated dual-core processing and local storage for basic utility workloads.

4.0 GB of system memory and 20 GB of local storage
